message:
Running command: # _TCL_ENV_IN is a LibreLane-internal variable set by the Python wrapper
# It's needed by io.tcl for loading liberty files. We need to provide it differently.
# Check what _TCL_ENV_IN does
grep -n "_TCL_ENV_IN\|TCL_ENV" /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/common/io.tcl 2>/dev/null | head -20
